class.name: ONDE_COMPONENT
class.description:
The component block describes the inspected specimen, including its material properties, geometry, and positioning within the reference frame. This version of the format handles only isotropic materials.
The MFMC equivalent is the SPECIMEN block (MFMC 2.0.0b).

field.name: ONDE_COMPONENT:VELOCITIES
field.detail:
The two values indicate the inspected component longitudinal and shear wave velocity respectively. If a velocity is unavailable, replace with NaN.
**Limitation:** This version of the format handles only isotropic materials.

field.name: ONDE_COMPONENT:VISUALIZATION_CAD
field.brief: DXF or STL file for visualization
field.detail: Contains a DXF or STL file for the component visualization. When using a DXF file, the profile will be extruded linearly or cylindrically according to the component type.

field.name: ONDE_COMPONENT:COMPONENT_FRAME
field.brief: Specimen frame in the reference frame
field.detail: Definition of the specimen frame in the reference frame. If not provided, the default value is identity with the reference frame.

notes.note:
In the planar coordinate system, the z direction corresponds to the thickness of the inspected specimen.
![Planar coordinate convention](../../images/media/figure6.png)

In the cylindrical coordinate system, the x direction corresponds to the cylinder axis.
![Cylindrical coordinate convention](../../images/media/figure7.png)

class.name: ONDE_PLANE
class.description: A planar component. Inherits all fields from ONDE_COMPONENT.

class.name: ONDE_CYLINDER
class.description: A cylindrical component. Inherits all fields from ONDE_COMPONENT.
